subcodes.first_line: O thou messenger of the love of God! Gabriel, at the court of the Glorious Lord, is a closely-drawn angel and an exalted servant, for he is the intermediary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پیک محبت الله جبریل در بارگاه رب جلیل ملک مقربست و بنده معظم زیرا واسطه
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the concourse on high
